commands.command: vp remove -g corepack >/dev/null 2>&1 || true # Isolate from a leftover managed corepack, which would win over the bundled one

commands: printf '20.18.0\n' > .node-version # Pin the project Node.js version
vp env exec node --version # Ensure Node.js is installed first
corepack --version # corepack shim runs the Node-bundled corepack
